name: UThintelo lweHypothermia (H --MATSHI)
description: I-Combat hypothermia ngumbulali ophambili onokuthintelwa kumothuko. I-triad ebulalayo: hypothermia + acidosis + coagulopathy. Thintela ngazo zonke iindleko.
steps: Susa zonke iimpahla ezimanzi ngokukhawuleza kangangoko kunokwenzeka.
Gquma isigulana ngengubo ebonakalisa ubushushu (isithuba)-- icala elimenyezelayo ANGAPHAKATHI kwisigulana.
Ukusonga intloko kunye nentamo (indawo ebalulekileyo yokulahleka kobushushu).
Insulate ukusuka emhlabeni -- beka into phakathi kwesigulana kunye nomhlaba obandayo.
Lawula ulwelo olufudumeleyo lwe-IV ukuba lukhona.
Musa ukuvumela isigulana ukuba singcangcazele ngaphandle kokugquma -- ukungcangcazela luphawu olusisilumkiso kwangethuba.
Beka iliso kwiqondo lobushushu ukuba ithemometha ikhona. Ngaphantsi kwe-35 ° C (95 ° F) = hypothermia.
warnings: I-Hypothermia yenza i-coagulopathy ibe mandundu -- izigulana ezophayo ziyaphola ngokukhawuleza kwaye zivale kancinci ngokusebenzayo.
Ukuthintela i-Field hypothermia kufuneka kuqale kwindawo yokulimala, kungekhona kwi-CCP.
